subject: [PATCH 09/11] mm/vmstat, memcontrol: Track ZSWAP_B, ZSWAPPED_B per-memcg-lruvec

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the inaccuracy introduced by moving ZSWAP_B and ZSWAPPED_B counters. Suggested exploring alternative solutions to improve accuracy without introducing new inaccuracies.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the tracking of zswap statistics to improve accuracy and granularity. It moves the ZSWAP_B and ZSWAPPED_B counters from memcg_stat_item to node_stat_item, allowing for more precise tracking at a finer granularity. However, this change introduces an inaccuracy in NR_ZSWAPPED_B due to the coarse PAGE_SIZE granularity of node stats.
